nasb.text: ‘Then on the tenth day of this seventh month you shall have a holy convocation, and you shall humble yourselves; you shall not do any work.

esv.text: “On the tenth day of this seventh month you shall have a holy convocation and afflict yourselves. You shall do no work,

cnv.text: “‘在七月十日，你們要有聖會，刻苦己心，甚麼都不可作，

ccb.text: “七月十日，你们要举行圣会，禁食，不可工作。
